title: Greenfield Phase Dependencies
description: Cross-phase dependency assertions for a single phase in a greenfield 3.x scaffolded project. Emitted by the synthesis-review skill alongside each phase's synthesis HTML. Consumed by scripts/visualize-graph.sh and the pre-commit freshness hook.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Currently fixed at 1; bumped if/when the dependency record shape changes.

phase.description: The phase this file describes dependencies for. Format: P<integer>[.<integer>] — e.g., P8, P10.5.

recordedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the synthesis review was approved.

dependencies.description: List of cross-phase dependency assertions. Each entry says: this phase assumes the depended-on path had a particular value at synthesis time.

path.description: Dot-path into the v2 context shape, starting at a phase id. Example: P0.willDeploy or P3.data.databaseHost. Phase id and remaining-path are joined by '.'.

value.description: Snapshot of the depended-on value at synthesis time. Used by visualize-graph.sh to label edges and by future freshness checks to detect drift. Any JSON value is allowed.

rationale.description: One-sentence explanation of why this phase depends on the path. Sourced from section-prompts.md.
